hero_title_accent: Compliance Control for Digital Asset VASPs
hero_subtitle: SFTY transforms fragmented director and control person screening into a unified, auditable workflow that integrates provider outputs, risk rules and case management for robust PEP oversight.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Screening delays increase with disconnected providers
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to maintain clear and auditable PEP screening for directors when sanctions and adverse media results remain siloed across multiple tools. This fragmentation slows review cycles and weakens the audit trail needed for regulatory readiness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects sanctions, adverse media and provider outputs into a single workflow that structures alerts, routes reviews, preserves evidence and delivers audit-ready records for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From PEP screening alerts to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY routes PEP screening alerts through policy rules and risk reviews into structured cases with documented evidence for compliance decisions and reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented alerts. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects disparate screening and risk signals into structured workflows, cases, decisions, and audit-ready evidence for clearer oversight of director PEP risk.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams with controlled provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and enterprise deployment for robust PEP screening and bank due diligence workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support director PEP screening workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how PEP screening integrates with case review
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence is preserved for PEP screening
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare provider orchestration options for PEP risk checks
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance teams a connected layer connecting screening, alerts, case management and reporting for structured, auditable AML operations around directors and control persons.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support PEP screening workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures PEP screening results into workflows that route alerts, create cases, link evidence and document reviewer decisions with full traceability.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves complete audit trails, decision logs and supporting case evidence to support review readiness for internal and external compliance inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing screening providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates outputs from multiple sanctions and PEP screening providers into one operational workflow without disrupting existing systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace sanctions or PEP providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above sanctions and PEP providers and connects their outputs into structured reviews, cases and audit reports without replacing them.
final_title: Structure director PEP screening into one workflow
final_description: Review how SFTY connects screening results, risk rules and case management into controlled, auditable workflows for VASP compliance teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
